allow: PowerShell(if \(-not $?\) { "Directory is empty or does not exist" })
PowerShell($settingsPath = "$env:APPDATA\\claudebrowser\\settings.json"; if \(Test-Path $settingsPath\) { Remove-Item $settingsPath; "Deleted old settings" } else { "No old settings found" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; "stopped PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "no listener on 8787" })

Bash(node -e "import\('@xenova/transformers'\).then\(m=>{console.log\('pipeline:', typeof m.pipeline\); console.log\('env present:', !!m.env, '| cacheDir settable:', 'cacheDir' in m.env\);}\).catch\(e=>console.log\('IMPORT ERROR:', e.message\)\)")

PowerShell($p = Get-Command cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { & cloudflared --version } else { "not on PATH; searching..."; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages","$env:ProgramFiles" -Recurse -Filter cloudflared.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName })

PowerShell($links = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\cloudflared.exe"; if \(Test-Path $links\) { "found: $links"; & $links --version } else { $f = Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -Recurse -Filter cloudflared.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($f\) { "found: $\($f.FullName\)"; & $f.FullName --version } else { "NOT FOUND" } })

Bash(node -e "import\('@huggingface/transformers'\).then\(m=>console.log\('pipeline:', typeof m.pipeline, '| env.cacheDir settable:', 'cacheDir' in m.env\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\('IMPORT ERROR:', e.message\)\)")
